script: echo '===== ALL BOT/AGENT/RESPONDER SERVICES =====' && systemctl list-units --type=service --no-pager --state=loaded --plain --no-legend | grep -iE 'bot|agent|responder' | awk '{printf "%-40s %s %s\n", $1, $3, $4}' && echo && echo '===== UPTIMES =====' && for s in $(systemctl list-units --type=service --no-pager --state=running --plain --no-legend | grep -iE 'bot|agent|responder' | awk '{print $1}'); do printf '%-40s ' "$s"; systemctl show "$s" -p ActiveEnterTimestamp --value; done
